title: RNA sequencing analysis and figure generation code for "p63 regulates stem cell maintenance and age-associated functional decline in human airway basal cells"
author: Farr, Andrew S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the R scripts used to process, analyze, and visualize bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing data in the manuscript “p63 regulates stem cell maintenance and age-associated functional decline in human airway basal cells”.   
 The code includes differential expression analysis (DESeq2), gene set enrichment analysis, and generation of RNA sequencing Figures of three independent datasets, in addition to integrative analyses across the datasets.    
 Bulk RNA sequencing data are available at GSE328414, and publicly available single-cell RNA sequencing data were obtained from previously published studies as described in the manuscript. 
  Analyses were performed in R using packages described within the associated manuscript. 
  Instructions for reproducing the analysis and figure generation are provided in the README file.

 Bulk RNA sequencing data are available at GSE328414, and publicly available single-cell RNA sequencing data were obtained from previously published studies as described in the manuscript. 
  Analyses were performed in R using packages described within the associated manuscript. 
  Instructions for reproducing the analysis and figure generation are provided in the README file.
